prs.title: Release: December 24, 2025 - Admin Dashboard Analytics & Code Quality Improvements
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Release PR bundling admin dashboard charts, enhanced filtering for users/companies, and extensive documentation updates across ~30 files — meaningful feature work but largely an integration/release branch of PR #204's content.

prs.title: Admin Dashboard Analytics and Enhanced Filtering System
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds admin dashboard analytics charts, enhanced filtering systems for users and companies, and supporting documentation across ~28 files — a solid multi-component feature with new UI components and page-level logic.

prs.title: AWS Partner Tier System Update & App Runner Config Protection
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Updates AWS partner tier validation logic, adds git hooks and a GitHub Action to protect apprunner.yaml, and touches core AI data-field collectors and Prisma definitions — meaningful infrastructure and domain logic work across several layers.

prs.title: changes AWS partnership tiers
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Focused change to AWS partnership tier definitions across the collector, interfaces, and Prisma field definitions — a modest domain update touching a small number of files with limited but purposeful logic changes.

prs.title: Documentation System, Admin Enhancements, and AI Agent Post-Processing
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Massive release PR spanning 121 files and 9000+ custom lines covering automatic AWS microsite generation, AI agent post-processing pipelines, chat agent sub-agents, gap/competitive analysis updates, admin enhancements, S3 file viewing, and extensive infrastructure/config changes — clearly weeks of transformative work across multiple domains.

prs.title: Added access to documentation for admins
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Adds admin access to a comprehensive documentation system with 47 files including a full historical backfill of per-PR release notes, user guides, and new feature docs — significant in volume but the bulk is documentation/content rather than complex engineering logic.

stories.name: Admin Dashboard Analytics & Reporting
stories.rationale: Delivered a comprehensive admin dashboard upgrade with analytics, enhanced filtering, and documentation access to improve operational visibility and admin productivity.

stories.name: AWS Partnership Tier Management
stories.rationale: Updated and protected AWS partner tier configurations across infrastructure and application layers to ensure accurate partnership status management.

stories.name: Documentation System & AI Agent Enhancements
stories.rationale: Introduced a documentation system, admin enhancements, and AI agent post-processing capabilities to improve platform intelligence and content management.
